subcodes.first_line: O thou who art small in age yet great in endowments, for thou hast been created from souls who have believed in God and His signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الصغیره فی السن الکبیره بالمواهب لانک خلقت من نفوس آمنت بالله و آیاته
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
